---
name: zoom-out
description: >-
  Zoom out to a higher abstraction level. Produces a map of relevant modules,
  callers, and data flow. Use when unfamiliar with a code area or needing to
  understand how a piece fits into the bigger picture.
disable-model-invocation: true
---

I don't know this area of code well. Go up a layer of abstraction. Give me a
map of all the relevant modules, callers, and data flow paths. Use the project's
domain vocabulary from copilot-instructions.md and reference any applicable ADRs.
